runs.text: 5 Min Pilates Abs Workout | Lilly’s Intense Core Activation Routine (No Equipment)

accessibilityData.label: 5 Min Pilates Abs Workout | Lilly’s Intense Core Activation Routine (No Equipment) 5 minutes, 57 seconds

runs.text:
This is one of my go-to abs activations when I want to really fire up my core in just 5 minutes — and now it’s your turn! 🔥

We’re moving through 10 Pilates abs exercises in 5 minutes, no repeats, no equipment, all done from home on the mat. It’s fast, intense, and focused on that deep core activation we all love.

This short Pilates ab workout is the perfect daily core activation to boost your routine — whether you're adding it to a longer session or using it as a quick challenge to sculpt and strengthen over time. 💪

If you're new here — I’m Lilly Sabri, Chartered Physiotherapist, certified APPI Pilates Instructor and founder of the LEAN Method. My mission is to help you feel strong, confident, and connected in your body — with workouts that challenge you, support you, and fit into your everyday life 🫶

✨ Want more? Start your FREE trial on the LEAN App today for:
✅ 30-min home workouts
✅ Personalized meal plans
✅ 500+ healthy recipes
👉

I’m SO proud of you for showing up for yourself — now let’s get to work! 💖


🔥 Join the LEAN Transformation Method! 🔥 Get access to a structured 8 week guide, personalised meal plans, hundreds of recipes, and so much more right at your fingertips! Get the best results on the LEAN App:
👩‍🎓 Students get 25% off the LEAN Transformation Method on the LEAN App:
🥤 The supplements & protein bars I use to get results:
💪 Get your Free Home Workout programs here:
Private Facebook Group- Lean with Lilly Guides

🔔 DON'T FORGET to Subscribe for daily uploads xx
Hit that bell icon to get a notification when I upload.

Disclaimer: Please remember that we cannot spot reduce fat, meaning we can’t choose the areas on our body where we lose fat. However to get fat loss results I recommend the following:
1. Being in calorie deficit
2. Cardio/ HIIT workout (I often call these Fat Loss/Burn workouts on my channel)
3. Resistance training and specific muscle targeted workouts. To strengthen and develop specific muscles.
I have hundreds of other home workouts available on my channel, so you can pick and choose which workouts you want to do, to not only make you build a strong body, but also feel amazing.
Please remember every body is different and we all progress at different rates. The fact that you have shown up and completed this workout is incredible. You should be very proud of yourself for taking the steps to improve not only your physical, but also your mental health.
The key to achieving your fitness and health goals is consistency and healthy lifestyle changes, without restriction. I don’t believe in crazy fad diets. Simply eat nutritious food, move your body, smile and enjoy the journey! Love Lilly

description.content: Subscribe for weekly Full Body Home Workouts and Pilates exercises!

accessibilityContext.label: Description. Subscribe for weekly Full Body Home Workouts and Pilates exe...tap for more.

title.simpleText: Lilly Sabri
Lilly Sabri

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Lilly Sabri
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Subscribe for weekly Full Body Home Workouts and Pilates exercises!

I’m Lilly Sabri, founder of LEAN with Lilly. I’ve been a Chartered Physiotherapist since 2010, APPI Pilates instructor, Fitness, Heath and Lifestyle Influencer.

Over the years, I’ve educated and empowered hundreds of thousands of people around the world to live a healthier lifestyle in a way that encourages increased body confidence regardless of shape, size and fitness level. Their transformations have been my driving force.

My aim is to create a supportive community, accessible to anyone wanting to take control and make changes towards leading a healthier, happier lifestyle!

I've now taken my years of physio experience and poured it into my guides, workout videos, and more to develop a fit, confident and healthy lifestyle for myself and others! Join the #LeanWithLilly family to take control, feel confident and live a healthier, happier lifestyle!

Socials: @lillysabri
Website: www.leanwithlilly.com

Subscribe for weekly Full Body Home Workouts and Pilates exercises!

I’m Lilly Sabri, founder of LEAN with Lilly. I’ve been a Chartered Physiotherapist since 2010, APPI Pilates instructor, Fitness, Heath and Lifestyle Influencer.

Over the years, I’ve educated and empowered hundreds of thousands of people around the world to live a healthier lifestyle in a way that encourages increased body confidence regardless of shape, size and fitness level. Their transformations have been my driving force.

My aim is to create a supportive community, accessible to anyone wanting to take control and make changes towards leading a healthier, happier lifestyle!

I've now taken my years of physio experience and poured it into my guides, workout videos, and more to develop a fit, confident and healthy lifestyle for myself and others! Join the #LeanWithLilly family to take control, feel confident and live a healthier, happier lifestyle!
